reason: Enabling FIPS mode requires the kernel boot parameter fips=1, which is only supported at installation or container build time. The rule cannot be remedied on an existing system; attempting to change it would require reinstalling the OS or rebuilding the container, which is beyond normal remediation scope.
estimated_impact: reboot required; authentication/authorization affected; Potential loss of compatibility with non-FIPS applications; Requires system reinstall or container rebuild; May affect cryptographic operations and authentication
